他文采飞扬，学术学富五车，说话出口成章，写的文章行云流水，真的是妙笔生花。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1658827932,"group_id":"7035494730368551951","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"错的不是我 错的是这个世界。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4johukLn8caDSnMwCj6bIEYhKNqGSP2tE3aPzAfN+5y","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/0221a14aeaef4241a4894c4cffc99dd9~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776621214&x-signature=NSzoX9nAJ0ufyGSgd00RCdzWhVo%3D","user_id":"2362182961999165","user_name":"怪盗基德快斗"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2362182961999165","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1649135299,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7035494730368551951","book_info":{"abstract":"唐瑜穿越到都市爽文世界，成为了富二代神豪反派，每活过一段剧情就能得到奖励！
他决定当个苟比苟到大结局！开局先退婚避免被龙王打死！
不料所有人都在演他，非要给他拉仇恨。
苏牧月：你想退婚？不，你不想。
老丈人：叶晨算个什么东西，我的女婿只能是唐瑜。
保镖队长：唐少对我大恩大德，我要为他杀龙王。
不管唐瑜怎么苟剧情，总有人出来帮忙拉仇恨。 
为了安全苟下去，唐瑜只好干碎龙王。
PS：欢乐泥石流反派文，轻松搞笑，梗点密集。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/00d26cc633d43cbd78d0da25d9d2a735","author":"萧禹","author_id":"","book_id":"7035494730368551951","book_name":"谁说反派不能当男主","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#402028","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"11.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":20,"name":"神豪","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=20&name=神豪&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":369,"name":"反派","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=369&name=反派&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":382,"name":"穿书","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=382&name=穿书&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":850,"name":"无脑爽","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=850&name=无脑爽&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7035512398433747468","read_count":"116910","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2746421"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"1231","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,神豪,穿越,多女主,反派,穿书,无脑爽","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/dbe580124be387b4a9b20f20655565df~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779285854&x-signature=3mn4BHYvdUFvhiuwRF1Ew8XhE88%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_lis
